🏆 Olympus Rating Rules ✕

Olympus Rating is calculated from 9 areas:

  • 🤖 Play vs Bot
    • Every win = 10XP
    • Every draw = 5XP
    • More win = More XP
  • 📚 Study
    • Get =>80% to get XP
    • Below 80% = 0 XP
  • ⚡ Puzzle Rush
    • Every run gives XP
    • XP gained = ⌊score ÷ 2⌋
    • <2 Score = 0 XP
    • Higher score = more XP
  • ⚡ Puzzle Streak
    • Every Streak rwards XP
    • XP gained = 5
    • <5 Score = 0 XP
    • Higher Streak = more XP
  • ⚔️ Puzzle Battle
    • Every win grant 6XP!
    • Time out grant XP
    • Win more Battle to get XP!
  • 🔴 Live Match
    • Every win gives +6XP!
    • Loose = 0 XP
    • Draw = 0 XP
    • Higher wins = More XP
  • 🎯 Quiz
    • Every attempt gives XP
    • XP gained = ⌊score ÷ 2⌋
    • <2 Score = 0 XP
    • Accuracy matters more than speed
  • 🎮 Mini-Games
    • +1 XP for every attempt (effort reward)
    • Bonus XP for improving high score
    • Anti-farming protection enabled
    • Excluded 🐴Vs👹 to stop farming
  • 🧩 Assignments
    • Completing all puzzles gives +5 XP
    • Reward is given only once per assignment
📊 Rating Progress Bar
• Shows how close you are to the next ELO
• Example: 60% to 1500 means you are
60% close to reaching 1500 ELO
• Final Rating = ⌊Average / 10⌋ × 10

⚡ Puzzle – 1280 🎯 Quiz – 980 🎮 Game – 1150

    🎲 Live Match How to Play

    🎯 How to Play Live Match

    • Create Game: Select your side & time, then click Create Room
    • Join Game: Enter Room Code and click Join
    • Moves: Drag or tap pieces to move
    • Rematch: Create new room only after the current game finish
    • IMPORTANT!: Create new room is not allowed while in live Game else app will crash
    • Premove: NO PREMOVE ALLOWED

    🏆 XP System

    • Win → +6 XP
    • Draw → +0 XP
    • Loss → +0 XP

    Tap anywhere outside to close

    ⚡ Olympus Tactical Rush ⚡

    Select Mode

    🧠 How to Play

    • ♟️ Solve as many chess puzzles as you can
    • ⏱️ Each correct move gives you a new puzzle instantly
    • ❌ Wrong move may cost a life or end the run
    • 🔥 Build streaks by solving puzzles continuously
    • 🏆 Challenge yourself to beat your best score
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⏱ 3 Min / 5 Min: Solve max puzzles before time runs out
    🔥 Survival: One mistake can end everything
    ⏱ 02:57
    ❤️ 3
    🔥 0

    🧠 Memorise the squares

    Select Mode

    🧠 How to Play

    • 👀 Watch carefully which squares light up
    • 🧠 Memorise their positions quickly
    • 👉 Click the correct squares after they disappear
    • ❌ Wrong square costs a life
    • ⭐ Correct answers increase your score
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⏱ 3 / 5 Min Rush: Solve as many patterns as possible
    🔥 Survival: One mistake can end the game
    ⏱ 0s
    ❤️ 3
    ⭐ 0

    👸 Help The Queen!

    Select Mode

    👸 How to Play

    • 👑 The Queen must reach the target square
    • 🧭 Click the correct path squares
    • ⚠️ Avoid blocked or dangerous squares
    • ⏱️ Solve before the timer runs out
    • ⭐ Each correct path increases difficulty
    • Play more game to earn XP
    🟢 Easy: More time, fewer obstacles
    🟡 Medium: Faster & trickier paths
    🔥 Hard: One mistake = game over
    ⏱ 8s
    ❤️ 3
    ⭐ 2

    👸 Find the Queen!

    Select Mode

    👸 How to Play

    • 👀 Watch carefully where the Queen appears
    • 🧠 Memorise her square before she disappears
    • 👉 Click the square where the Queen was
    • ❌ Wrong square costs a life
    • ⭐ Correct answers increase your score
    • Play more game to earn XP
    🟢 Easy: Slower speed, fewer squares
    🟡 Medium: Faster & more confusing
    🔥 Survival: One mistake can end the game
    ⏱ 0s
    ❤️ 3
    ⭐ 0

    👸 Where is the Queen?

    🐴 Knight Journey

    Select Mode

    📘 How to Play

    • 🐴 A knight appears on the board
    • ✨ Squares flash one by one
    • 🧠 Remember the flashing path
    • 👆 Click the squares in correct order
    • ⭐ Each level adds one more move
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⭐ Level: 1
    ❤️ Lives: 3

    🧪 Lab Mixer

    Select Mode

    📘 How to Play

    • 🎨 Colored squares will flash
    • 🧠 Remember the colors
    • ❓ A color will be asked
    • 👆 Click the correct square
    • ⭐ Each round adds difficulty
    • Play more game to earn XP
    🧪 Round: 1
    ⚪ ⚪ ⚪
    🎯 FIND: BLUE

    🐴👹 Knight vs Monster

    Select Mode

    📘 How to Play

    • 🐴 You control the knight
    • 👹 Monsters chase you like a king
    • 🎯 Survive as many turns as possible
    • 💀 If a monster catches you — game over
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⭐ Turns: 0
    👹 Monsters: 1

    🏰 Knight Escape Maze

    Select Mode

    📘 How to Play

    • 🐴 Move the knight legally
    • 🧱 Walls block your path
    • 👹 Watch out! they are coming for you!
    • 🏁 Reach the exit to win
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⭐ Moves: 0
    🏆 Level: 1

    🐴 Knight Speed Run

    Speed Challenge

    Collect as many ⭐ as possible before time runs out!

    📘 How to Play

    • 🐴 Move the knight legally
    • ⭐ Collect stars as fast as possible
    • 💣 Watch Out for Bombs!
    • ⏱ Beat the timer
    • 🏆 Higher score = better speed
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⭐ Score: 0
    ⏱ Time: 30s

    🔥 Knight Lava Floor

    🔥 Survive the Lava

    • 🐴 Move the knight using legal moves
    • 🔥 Lava spreads after every move
    • ☠️ Step on lava = Game Over
    • 🏆 Survive as long as you can
    • Play more game to earn XP
    ⏱ Turns: 0
    🔥 Lava: 0

    🍎 Knight Fog Quest

    Find the Hidden Apple!

    Move the knight 🐴 on a 10×10 board.
    The board is hidden by fog.
    Find all 🍎 apples before time runs out!

    ⏱️ Speed Challenge

    Finish finding apples before the timer ends.

    👑 Chess Math Journey

    Select Level

    📘 How to Play

    • 👑 King starts from last rank
    • 🟢 Easy = 40 Sec/ 🟡 Medium = 60 Sec/ 🔥 Hard = 90 Sec/
    • ➕ Solve the math shown above
    • ⬆ Choose one of the next 3 squares
    • 🚩 Complete the all the questions within time
    • ❌ Wrong answer = Game Over
    • Play more game to earn XP

    • 🎨 Board colors change automatically

    • ⏱ Finish before time runs out
    • ⭐ Difficulty only changes available time
    • Play more game to earn XP
